task_zh: 安装 ICML app，并确认能访问注册邮箱里的 receipt / QR code。
task_en: Install the ICML app and confirm access to the registration receipt / QR code in email.
why_zh: 用于现场 check-in、日程和聊天。
why_en: Needed for check-in, schedule updates, and attendee chat.

task_zh: 在官方 virtual site 里 bookmark 重点 papers / sessions，并导出或离线保存个人日程。
task_en: Bookmark key papers/sessions on the official virtual site and export or save the personal schedule offline.
why_zh: 官方提醒会场 Wi-Fi 在拥挤区域可能不稳定。
why_en: Official guidance warns that venue Wi-Fi may be unreliable in crowded areas.

why_zh: Help Desk 时间跟注册台一致，且 workshop-only badge 从 7 月 9 日 16:00 开始领取。
why_en: Help Desk follows registration hours, and workshop-only badge pickup starts Jul 9 at 16:00.

task_zh: 学生票参会者准备学生证；所有人检查胸牌姓名/机构信息。
task_en: Student-rate attendees should carry student ID; everyone should check badge name/institution details.
why_zh: 学生证和身份信息会影响 check-in。
why_en: Student ID and profile details affect check-in.

task_zh: 带 Type C/F 转换头，确认电脑/手机充电器支持 220V/60Hz。
task_en: Bring Type C/F adapters and confirm laptop/phone chargers support 220V/60Hz.
why_zh: 韩国电压和插座与美国/英国/新加坡等常见插头不同。
why_en: Korea's voltage and outlets differ from US/UK/Singapore-style plugs.

task_zh: 购买或充值 Tmoney/EZL/WOWPASS/Climate Card，并准备少量现金。
task_en: Buy or top up Tmoney/EZL/WOWPASS/Climate Card and keep some cash.
why_zh: 地铁/公交/便利店支付和换乘折扣更顺。
why_en: Makes subway/bus/convenience-store payments and transfer discounts easier.

task_zh: 机场先处理 SIM/eSIM/Wi-Fi、少量韩元现金和 6103 机场巴士/地铁路线。
task_en: At the airport, handle SIM/eSIM/Wi-Fi, small KRW cash, and the 6103 airport bus or subway route.
why_zh: 比到 COEX 后临时找网络、换汇和交通方案更稳。
why_en: More reliable than improvising network, cash, and transport after reaching COEX.

task_zh: 到 COEX 后先定位 Hall B Foyer、Hall A、East/West Gate、2F Plaetz。
task_en: At COEX, first locate Hall B Foyer, Hall A, East/West Gate, and 2F Plaetz.
why_zh: 这些覆盖 help desk、poster、医疗、寄存和出入口。
why_en: These cover help desk, posters, medical office, luggage check, and entrances.

task_zh: 每天早上检查天气；雨天优先走 COEX/Starfield 室内动线。
task_en: Check weather each morning; use COEX/Starfield indoor routes on rainy days.
why_zh: 7 月 7-12 日预报显示高湿、降雨和雷阵雨风险。
why_en: The Jul 7-12 forecast shows humid conditions with rain/thunderstorm risk.
source_url: web.weather: Seoul forecast captured 2026-07-02 for Jul 7-12

task_zh: 离开酒店前检查胸牌；离开会场后取下胸牌。
task_en: Check badge before leaving the hotel; remove badge offsite.
why_zh: 无胸牌不能入场，场外佩戴胸牌也不必要。
why_en: Badge is required for entry and unnecessary offsite.

task_zh: Poster 作者确认 session、poster number、poster 尺寸、取件时间和 Hall A 张贴规则。
task_en: Poster authors should confirm session, poster number, poster size, pickup time, and Hall A hanging rules.
why_zh: 取件和张贴规则非常具体，错过会影响展示。
why_en: Pickup and hanging rules are specific and can affect presentation.

task_zh: 找工作/合作的人先登录 ICML Careers，再按 sponsor list 和 Expo events 排路线。
task_en: For jobs or collaborations, log into ICML Careers first, then plan routes from the sponsor list and Expo events.
why_zh: 官方 Careers 和 Expo 比外部晚宴更稳定，且部分岗位/面试机会只对注册参会者开放。
why_en: Official Careers and Expo are more stable than external dinners, and some postings/interviews are registration-gated.

task_en: Save 112, 119, 1330, and Lost112 on the phone.
why_zh: 紧急、医疗、旅游热线、失物查询可快速使用。
why_en: Enables quick access to emergency, medical, tourist hotline, and lost-item support.

task_zh: 所有 Luma guests-only 活动报名通过后，把精确地址替换进地图和路线链接。
task_en: After RSVP approval for guests-only Luma events, replace map and route links with the exact address.
why_zh: 公开页只到区域级，不能当正式会场。
why_en: Public pages expose only an area, not the final venue.
